query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'messages' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%audio%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'messages' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%transcri%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'messages' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%audio%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'messages' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%transcri%');
